title: 3D Wooden Modeler — Model File (.woodmodel.json)
description: Saved scene produced by saveModel(). Current version: 3. Backwards-compatible loaders handle v1 (no groups), v2 (groups, no rulers) and v3 (groups + rulers).

version.description: Format version. 1 = pieces only; 2 = + groups; 3 = + rulers.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the file was saved.

pieces.description: Ordered list of all scene pieces. Groups are reconstructed from groupId references in a second pass.

type.description: Fixed English identifier for the piece shape. Never translated; used as a discriminator for dimension fields.

id.description: Stable numeric auto-increment ID assigned by addPiece() (pieceCounter). Unique within a saved file but not across files.

label.description: User-editable display name shown as a 3D sprite and in the object list. Null or empty string when not set.

notches.description: Count of CSG Cut Joint operations applied to this piece. Purely informational (used in CSV export).

csgModified.description: True when the piece geometry was altered by at least one Cut Joint. When true, geoPositions and geoNormals must be present and the shape-specific dimension fields are no longer used to rebuild geometry.

price.description: Per-piece price. Interpretation depends on priceMode. 0 for split-part members that belong to a source group (cost counted once via sourcePrice).

priceMode.description: 'fixed' = price is the total cost for this piece. 'per_mm' = price × relevant dimension (length along the split axis for Boards/Dowels) gives the cost.

sourceId.description: Shared UUID assigned to all parts produced from the same Split operation ('source group'). Null when not a split part.

sourcePrice.description: Original price of the unsplit board/dowel. Used to display the group cost once in the cost summary and CSV. 0 when not a split part.

sourcePriceMode.description: priceMode of the original unsplit piece. Null when not a split part.

sourceLabel.description: Label of the original unsplit piece. Null when not a split part.

groupId.description: gId of the THREE.Group this piece belongs to (e.g. 'grp_1'). Null for ungrouped pieces.

rx.description: X rotation in radians (Euler XYZ order).

ry.description: Y rotation in radians (Euler XYZ order).

rz.description: Z rotation in radians (Euler XYZ order).

w.description: Width in mm. Required for Board, Wedge, L-Bracket.

h.description: Height in mm. Required for Board, Wedge, L-Bracket, Dowel, Tapered Leg.

d.description: Depth in mm. Required for Board, Wedge, L-Bracket.

r.description: Radius in mm. Required for Dowel.

rTop.description: Top radius in mm. Required for Tapered Leg.

rBottom.description: Bottom radius in mm. Required for Tapered Leg.

geoPositions.description: Flat array of vertex XYZ coordinates for CSG-modified geometry (BufferGeometry position attribute). Present only when csgModified is true.

geoNormals.description: Flat array of vertex normal XYZ values for CSG-modified geometry (BufferGeometry normal attribute). Same length as geoPositions. Present only when csgModified is true.

groups.description: THREE.Group containers. Empty array in v1 files. Pieces reference their group via groupId.

gId.description: Unique group identifier, format 'grp_<n>' where n is a monotonic integer (groupCounter).

rx.description: Group X rotation in radians (Euler XYZ).

ry.description: Group Y rotation in radians (Euler XYZ).

rz.description: Group Z rotation in radians (Euler XYZ).

rulers.description: Persistent measurement lines. Empty array in v1/v2 files.

p1.description: Start point [x, y, z] in world-space mm.

p2.description: End point [x, y, z] in world-space mm.
